name: Grilled Marinated Steak
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds sirloin steak (cut into three pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into three pieces.
2. Place the steak in a freezer bag.
3. Combine the marinade ingredients: 3 tablespoons red wine vinegar, 1 tablespoon Worcestershire sauce, 1 tablespoon salad oil, and 2 crushed garlic cloves.
4. Add the marinade to the bag with the meat.
5. Seal the bag and freeze until ready to use.
6. To prepare, thaw the steak in the bag with the marinade.
7. Grill or barbecue the steak under an oven broiler until medium rare.
8. Do NOT serve the marinade with the meat.
9. Serve with baked potatoes and Caesar Salad.
